attributes.title: ⚙️ Daemon Processes
attributes.visState:
{"type": "markdown", "params": {"fontSize": 12, "markdown": "# ⚙️ Daemon Processes

Background daemon health — heartbeats, errors.

Each Daemon type runs a different background process:

| Daemon Type | Role |
|-------------|------|
| **SCHEDULER** | Fires cron-based schedules on time |
| **SENSOR** | Evaluates sensors periodically (~30s) |
| **ASSET** | Handles asset materialization events |
| **EVENT_LOG_CONSUMER** | Consumes & indexes event log entries |
| **FRESHNESS_DAEMON** | Checks asset freshness policies |
| **BACKFILL** | Executes backfill / historical runs |
| **MONITORING** | Monitors runs for timeouts / dangling |
| **QUEUED_RUN_COORDINATOR** | Manages the run queue (launch / prioritize) |

| Metric | Warning | Critical |
|--------|---------|---------|
| Heartbeat Age | > 120s | > 600s |
| Errors | > 5 | > 20 |", "openLinksInNewTab": false}, "aggs": []}

attributes.title: 📊 Runs Queue
attributes.visState:
{"type": "markdown", "params": {"fontSize": 12, "markdown": "# 📊 Runs Queue

Run queue backlog and execution load.

| Metric | Warning | Critical |
|--------|---------|---------|
| Queue Depth | > 5 | > 20 |
| Oldest Age | > 300s | > 900s |
| In Progress | > 10 | > 30 |", "openLinksInNewTab": false}, "aggs": []}

attributes.title: ⏰ Sensors & Schedules
attributes.visState:
{"type": "markdown", "params": {"fontSize": 12, "markdown": "# ⏰ Sensors & Schedules

Monitors sensor and schedule liveness.

**What is a Tick?** A tick is one evaluation cycle. The Dagster Daemon periodically wakes up each sensor/schedule to check conditions — each wake-up is a tick.
- **Sensor tick** → Daemon evaluates sensor every ~30s by default
- **Schedule tick** → Daemon fires the schedule on its cron expression

`last_tick_age_seconds` = seconds since the last tick happened.
- ✅ Normal: 30–60s (sensors), depends on cron interval (schedules)
- ⚠️ Warning: >300s (sensors), >600s (schedules)
- 🔴 Critical: >900s (sensors), >1800s (schedules)

💡 **No tick data?** This panel shows nothing when there are zero sensors or schedules defined. Your deployment currently has **0 sensors** and **0 schedules**. Define and enable them in your Dagster code locations, and tick metrics appear automatically.

| Metric | Warning | Critical |
|--------|---------|---------|
| Tick Age (Sensor) | > 300s | > 900s |
| Tick Age (Schedule) | > 600s | > 1800s |
| Disabled | count = 0 | — |", "openLinksInNewTab": false}, "aggs": []}

attributes.description: Index pattern 指向所有 metrics-* 索引（Dagster OTel metrics），以 @timestamp 為時間欄位。
attributes.name: metrics-*
attributes.title: metrics-*

attributes.description: Dagster Daemon heartbeat count. 0 means no heartbeats — Daemon may be crashed or not running. Inverted colour: higher is better.
attributes.title: [Daemon] Heartbeat Count
attributes.visState: {"type": "metric", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "max", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "dagster.daemon.heartbeat.count", "customLabel": "Heartbeats"}}], "params": {"metric": {"colorSchema": "Green to Red", "colorsRange": [{"from": 0, "to": 0}, {"from": 0, "to": 100}], "labels": {"show": true}, "invertColors": true, "percentageMode": false, "style": {"bgColor": false, "bgFill": "#000", "fontSize": 40, "labelColor": false, "subText": ""}, "useRanges": false}}}

attributes.description: Table: latest heartbeat age (seconds) grouped by Daemon type (sensor / schedule / run_worker / backfill …). Quickly identify which Daemon type has stale heartbeats.
attributes.title: [Daemon] Age by Type
attributes.visState: {"type": "table", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "max", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "dagster.daemon.heartbeat_age_seconds", "customLabel": "Age (s)"}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "bucket", "params": {"field": "labels.dagster_daemon_type", "size": 10, "order": "desc", "orderBy": "1", "customLabel": "Daemon Type"}}], "params": {"perPage": 10, "showPartialRows": false, "showMetricsAtAllLevels": false, "sort": {"columnIndex": null, "direction": null}, "showTotal": false, "totalFunc": "sum"}}

attributes.description: Number of runs currently executing. Helps assess current system load — sustained high values may impact performance.
attributes.title: [Runs] In Progress
attributes.visState: {"type": "metric", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "max", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "dagster.run.in_progress.count", "customLabel": "In Progress"}}], "params": {"metric": {"colorSchema": "Green to Red", "colorsRange": [{"from": 0, "to": 300}, {"from": 300, "to": 900}, {"from": 900, "to": 99999}], "labels": {"show": true}, "invertColors": false, "percentageMode": false, "style": {"bgColor": false, "bgFill": "#000", "fontSize": 40, "labelColor": false, "subText": ""}, "useRanges": false}}}

attributes.description: Tracks the number of Dagster runs waiting in the queue. Higher values indicate a backlog, possibly due to Daemon processing lag or resource constraints.
attributes.title: [Runs] Queue Depth
attributes.visState: {"type": "metric", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "max", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "dagster.run.queue.depth", "customLabel": "Queue Depth"}}], "params": {"metric": {"colorSchema": "Green to Red", "colorsRange": [{"from": 0, "to": 100}], "labels": {"show": true}, "invertColors": false, "percentageMode": false, "style": {"bgColor": false, "bgFill": "#000", "fontSize": 40, "labelColor": false, "subText": ""}, "useRanges": false}}}

attributes.description: Age in seconds of the oldest run in the queue. >900s (red zone) means runs are stuck; check Daemon health.
attributes.title: [Runs] Oldest Queue Age (s)
attributes.visState: {"type": "metric", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "max", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "dagster.run.queue.oldest_age_seconds", "customLabel": "Oldest (s)"}}], "params": {"metric": {"colorSchema": "Green to Red", "colorsRange": [{"from": 0, "to": 300}, {"from": 300, "to": 900}, {"from": 900, "to": 99999}], "labels": {"show": true}, "invertColors": false, "percentageMode": false, "style": {"bgColor": false, "bgFill": "#000", "fontSize": 40, "labelColor": false, "subText": ""}, "useRanges": false}}}

attributes.description: Count of enabled Dagster sensors. 0 means all sensors are disabled (alert condition). Inverted colour: higher is better.
attributes.title: [Sensors] Enabled
attributes.visState: {"type": "metric", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "max", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "dagster.sensor.enabled.count", "customLabel": "Sensors"}}], "params": {"metric": {"colorSchema": "Green to Red", "colorsRange": [{"from": 0, "to": 0}, {"from": 0, "to": 100}], "labels": {"show": true}, "invertColors": true, "percentageMode": false, "style": {"bgColor": false, "bgFill": "#000", "fontSize": 40, "labelColor": false, "subText": ""}, "useRanges": false}}}

attributes.description: Count of enabled Dagster schedules. 0 means all schedules are disabled (alert condition). Inverted colour: higher is better.
attributes.title: [Schedules] Enabled
attributes.visState: {"type": "metric", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "max", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "dagster.schedule.enabled.count", "customLabel": "Schedules"}}], "params": {"metric": {"colorSchema": "Green to Red", "colorsRange": [{"from": 0, "to": 0}, {"from": 0, "to": 100}], "labels": {"show": true}, "invertColors": true, "percentageMode": false, "style": {"bgColor": false, "bgFill": "#000", "fontSize": 40, "labelColor": false, "subText": ""}, "useRanges": false}}}

attributes.description: Max seconds since any schedule last ticked. >1800s (30 min) indicates the scheduler may be stalled. Inverted colour: lower is better.
attributes.title: [Schedules] Last Tick (s)
attributes.visState: {"type": "metric", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "max", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "dagster.schedule.last_tick_age_seconds", "customLabel": "Tick (s)"}}], "params": {"metric": {"colorSchema": "Green to Red", "colorsRange": [{"from": 0, "to": 600}, {"from": 600, "to": 1800}, {"from": 1800, "to": 99999}], "labels": {"show": true}, "invertColors": true, "percentageMode": false, "style": {"bgColor": false, "bgFill": "#000", "fontSize": 40, "labelColor": false, "subText": ""}, "useRanges": false}}}

attributes.title: [Daemon] Heartbeat Age by Type
attributes.visState: {"type": "line", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "max", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "dagster.daemon.heartbeat_age_seconds", "customLabel": "Age (s)"}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "split", "params": {"field": "labels.dagster_daemon_type", "size": 5, "order": "desc", "orderBy": "1", "customLabel": "Daemon Type", "otherBucket": false, "otherBucketLabel": "Other", "missingBucket": false, "missingBucketLabel": "Missing"}}, {"id": "3", "enabled": true, "type": "date_histogram", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "@timestamp", "timeRange": {"from": "now-24h", "to": "now"}, "useNormalizedEsInterval": true, "interval": "auto", "drop_partials": false, "min_doc_count": 1, "extended_bounds": {}}}], "params": {"type": "line", "grid": {"categoryLines": false}, "categoryAxes": [{"id": "CategoryAxis-1", "type": "category", "position": "bottom", "show": true, "style": {}, "scale": {"type": "linear"}, "labels": {"show": true, "truncate": 100, "filter": true}, "title": {}}], "valueAxes": [{"id": "ValueAxis-1", "name": "LeftAxis-1", "type": "value", "position": "left", "show": true, "style": {}, "scale": {"type": "linear", "mode": "normal"}, "labels": {"show": true, "filter": true, "truncate": 100}, "title": {"text": "Age (s)"}}], "seriesParams": [{"show": true, "type": "line", "mode": "stacked", "data": {"id": "1"}, "valueAxis": "ValueAxis-1"}], "addTooltip": true, "addLegend": true, "legendPosition": "right", "times": [], "addTimeMarker": false, "labels": {}, "splitSeries": true}}

attributes.visState: {"type": "line", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "max", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "dagster.sensor.last_tick_age_seconds", "customLabel": "Tick (s)"}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "split", "params": {"field": "labels.dagster_daemon_type", "size": 5, "order": "desc", "orderBy": "1", "customLabel": "Type", "otherBucket": false, "otherBucketLabel": "Other", "missingBucket": false, "missingBucketLabel": "Missing"}}, {"id": "3", "enabled": true, "type": "date_histogram", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "@timestamp", "timeRange": {"from": "now-24h", "to": "now"}, "useNormalizedEsInterval": true, "interval": "auto", "drop_partials": false, "min_doc_count": 1, "extended_bounds": {}}}], "params": {"type": "line", "grid": {"categoryLines": false}, "categoryAxes": [{"id": "CategoryAxis-1", "type": "category", "position": "bottom", "show": true, "style": {}, "scale": {"type": "linear"}, "labels": {"show": true, "truncate": 100, "filter": true}, "title": {}}], "valueAxes": [{"id": "ValueAxis-1", "name": "LeftAxis-1", "type": "value", "position": "left", "show": true, "style": {}, "scale": {"type": "linear", "mode": "normal"}, "labels": {"show": true, "filter": true, "truncate": 100}, "title": {"text": "Tick (s)"}}], "seriesParams": [{"show": true, "type": "line", "mode": "stacked", "data": {"id": "1"}, "valueAxis": "ValueAxis-1"}], "addTooltip": true, "addLegend": true, "legendPosition": "right", "times": [], "addTimeMarker": false, "labels": {}, "thresholdLine": {"show": true, "value": 900, "width": 1, "style": "dashed", "color": "#E7664C"}, "splitSeries": true}}

attributes.description: Table: error count grouped by Daemon type. High error counts indicate malfunctioning Daemon processes that need investigation.
attributes.title: [Daemon] Errors by Type
attributes.visState: {"type": "table", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "sum", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "dagster.daemon.heartbeat_errors.count", "customLabel": "Errors (sum)"}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "bucket", "params": {"field": "labels.dagster_daemon_type", "size": 10, "order": "desc", "orderBy": "1", "customLabel": "Daemon Type"}}], "params": {"perPage": 10, "showPartialRows": false, "showMetricsAtAllLevels": false, "sort": {"columnIndex": null, "direction": null}, "showTotal": false, "totalFunc": "sum"}}

attributes.visState: {"type": "line", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "max", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "dagster.run.queue.oldest_age_seconds", "customLabel": "Age (s)"}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "date_histogram", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "@timestamp", "timeRange": {"from": "now-24h", "to": "now"}, "useNormalizedEsInterval": true, "interval": "auto", "drop_partials": false, "min_doc_count": 1, "extended_bounds": {}}}], "params": {"type": "line", "grid": {"categoryLines": false}, "categoryAxes": [{"id": "CategoryAxis-1", "type": "category", "position": "bottom", "show": true, "style": {}, "scale": {"type": "linear"}, "labels": {"show": true, "truncate": 100, "filter": true}, "title": {}}], "valueAxes": [{"id": "ValueAxis-1", "name": "LeftAxis-1", "type": "value", "position": "left", "show": true, "style": {}, "scale": {"type": "linear", "mode": "normal"}, "labels": {"show": true, "filter": true, "truncate": 100}, "title": {"text": "Age (s)"}}], "seriesParams": [{"show": true, "type": "line", "mode": "stacked", "data": {"id": "1"}, "valueAxis": "ValueAxis-1"}], "addTooltip": true, "addLegend": true, "legendPosition": "right", "times": [], "addTimeMarker": false, "labels": {}, "thresholdLine": {"show": true, "value": 900, "width": 1, "style": "full", "color": "#E7664C"}}}

attributes.description: Max seconds since any sensor last ticked. >900s indicates sensors may be stalled — Daemon likely unhealthy. Inverted colour: lower is better.
attributes.title: [Sensors] Last Tick (s)
attributes.visState: {"type": "metric", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "max", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "dagster.sensor.last_tick_age_seconds", "customLabel": "Tick (s)"}}], "params": {"metric": {"colorSchema": "Green to Red", "colorsRange": [{"from": 0, "to": 300}, {"from": 300, "to": 900}, {"from": 900, "to": 99999}], "labels": {"show": true}, "invertColors": true, "percentageMode": false, "style": {"bgColor": false, "bgFill": "#000", "fontSize": 40, "labelColor": false, "subText": ""}, "useRanges": false}}}

attributes.description: Dagster platform health dashboard v2 — 3-column layout. Left: Daemon heartbeat & errors; Center: Runs queue & execution; Right: Sensors/Schedules liveness. Includes time-series trend charts with warning/critical thresholds.
attributes.title: [Dagster] Platform Health Dashboard v2 (EN)
